items.definition_en: A board game is a game played on a flat surface using pieces or cards.
items.example_en: We played a board game with friends last night.

items.definition_en: A card game is a game played using a set of playing cards.
items.example_en: My family loves to play a card game after dinner.

items.definition_en: A dice is a small cube with numbers on each side used in games.
items.example_en: Roll the dice to see who starts first.

items.definition_en: A piece is a small object used to play a board game.
items.example_en: Move your piece to the next square.

items.definition_en: A deck is a full set of cards used to play games.
items.example_en: He shuffled the deck and dealt the cards.

items.definition_en: A turn is the time when it is your chance to play in a game.
items.example_en: It is your turn to draw a card.

items.definition_en: A token is a small object used to show your place in a game.
items.example_en: She chose a red token for the game.

items.definition_en: A move is a play or action taken during a game.
items.example_en: That was a smart move in chess.

items.definition_en: The winner is the person who wins a game.
items.example_en: Anna was the winner of the card game.

items.definition_en: The loser is the person who does not win a game.
items.example_en: He was not happy to be the loser this time.

items.definition_en: A rule tells people how to play a game.
items.example_en: We learned the rule before we started playing.

items.definition_en: A card is a small rectangular piece used in card games.
items.example_en: He picked a card from the deck.

items.definition_en: A square is one part of the board in many games.
items.example_en: Move your piece to the blue square.

items.definition_en: A game board is the flat surface where a board game is played.
items.example_en: Put the game board on the table to start.

items.definition_en: A player is a person who takes part in a game.
items.example_en: Each player takes a turn to play.

items.definition_en: A hand is the group of cards a player holds.
items.example_en: She looked at the cards in her hand.

items.definition_en: A shuffle is the act of mixing cards before playing.
items.example_en: He did a quick shuffle before dealing.

items.definition_en: A match is a single game or round between players.
items.example_en: The match started at seven o'clock.

items.definition_en: A table is the place where players sit to play games.
items.example_en: Everyone sat at the table to start the game.

items.definition_en: A score is the points a player gets in a game.
items.example_en: She kept the highest score in the game.
